Name: Average time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to be performed after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING compared to the average resolution time of Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the end of the case

Name: Time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants that include re-submission cycles
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Average waiting time to the Declaration REJECTED by MISSING after the last approval step in the process variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration REJECTED by MISSING and the subsequent Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING' and activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE'

Name: Total time it takes Declaration REJECTED by MISSING to occur after the initial Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in rejected-and-resubmitted cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING relative to the typical duration of Request Payment in successful variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Average time until Declaration REJECTED by MISSING is performed in variants that do not reach Payment Handled
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Total time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in comparison with the time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Minimum time for Declaration REJECTED by MISSING when preceded by Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR without intermediate approvals
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in variants involving missing documentation as per process description
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'

Name: Cycle Time of Declaration REJECTED by MISSING in cases that originate from domestic declarations versus pre-paid travel costs
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Declaration REJECTED by MISSING'
